sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n737" key="a)gnu/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀγνύς</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῦθος</itype> (on the accent <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> Hdn.Gr.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.763</biblScope> </bibl>), <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n737.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">loom-weight</tr_>, in pl., <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.156b</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.36</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
